name: Sonatype Nexus
description: Sonatype Nexus — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Artifact Management.

seo.title: Sonatype Nexus Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Sonatype Nexus analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Sonatype Nexus is a CI/CD for Applications tool.
pros: Automates build, test, and deploy pipelines
cons: Compute minutes add up for large monorepos
review.not_for: Projects with infrequent or manual releases
